data.body: Created calibration epic 9d50-ead1-de68-4362 (Review-gate calibration 2026-07-12) with 7 children: 9f25 derive code-review block threshold from adjudicated code-v2 distribution (crossover rule: smallest t where P(correctly blocking)>0.5, prior 0.6, incl. 0.54-band + 0.60-ceiling analyses + ADR-0036 A/B); b9c0 enable blocking lane at derived threshold (depends_on 9f25); f32e impact_code lane gap for #529-class untested-degradation (code-v3 bump); e1f2 loosen CLAUDE.md mandatory advisory-remediation to judgment framing (observe organic uptake; BLOCK-remediation + sign-every-round unchanged); 24ec persist completion-verifier FAIL verdicts; 74d9 FAILs enumerate all unmet criteria; ac0e document no-signature-demands-in-ACs rule. Epic supersedes idea 9c04, relates_to 897f + bug 02a3.
